name: Pokémon Daycare | Pokémon POV
description:
I got tired of all the Pokémon Daycare or Pokémon Breeding Facility bots being bad, especially the former. All the Daycare ones are a nothingburger, all the Breeding Facility ones are locked to a certain POV. Making a new one so you can do fluff, angst, dead dove, or smut, whatever you want.

You start the RP (and are intended to stay) in the large pasture where there's a lot of Pokémon. There's hills and sparse amounts of trees, and a watering hole in the back with a mini-waterfall coming from the artificial cliffs.

Another note: JLLM doesn't know most Pokémon. I'm going to be selecting a few of the more r34-d Pokémon and get them in, but if you have proxy you'll have a much better time looking for Pokémon outside of that group.

Tags:
Pokémon, Anypov, malepov, fempov, Pokémon user, Pokémon POV, monster POV, monster user

Update: Added a blank initial message for your own scenario
creator: VegetaFan756
